form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 5th (Fr3) over 1755m after showing early speed at Echuca beaten 24 m by Maas Betting Again (2:04.70) in 0W/15 0K stake on April 5 at $51. Before that was well back in the run when 8th (Fr7) over 1690m at Shepparton beaten 45 m by With In Reason (2:00.40) in NR 55 to 60 on March 17 at $19. Prepared to overlook against this lot.

form.trainerName: T K GANGE & J G ALLAN-GANGE

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failing to maintain position until the start.
Inconvenienced at the 1100m when improving three wide.

form.formComment: Last start 12th (Fr4) over 2240m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 25 m by Im Downbythebeach (2:43.50) in NR 56 to 64 on April 10 at $151. Two runs back tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.75 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Kilmore (2:05.80) beating My Ultimate Luigi in NR 50 to 53 on March 26 at $34 at the bell was 3rd-3.63. Even the minor placings look out of reach.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung into the sprint lane after the start.

form.formComment: Last start by a head after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Cranbourne (2:33.80) beating Mikispur in NR 53 to 58 on March 29 at $4.80 at the bell was leading 4.2. No surprise if he made it two in a row.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced in the home straight by Caledonian Ranger.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th (Fr3) over 2080m at Cranbourne was 4th-6.2 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Platinum Jive (2:30.90) in NR 56 to 64 on April 3 at $7.50. The run before 9th (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track beaten 30 m by Komodo (2:01.00) in NR80 on March 28 at $31. Good enough to make amends in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 1650m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bendigo, beaten 25 m by Keayang Renegade (1:55.80) in 0W/15 0K stake on April 8 at $31. Before that, a good run when 2nd (Sr4) over 1690m at Shepparton was 6th-11.09 at the bell, beaten 1.4 m by With In Reason (2:00.40) in NR 55 to 60 on March 17 at $14. Top-three finish is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 1650m after showing early pace at Bendigo beaten 7 m by Hes No Romeo (1:56.70) in NR 60 to 75 on April 1 at $41. Two runs back 10th (Sr2) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 7th-13.3m 2WWC beaten 18 m by Reign Em In (2:00.70) in NR 50 to 55 on November 17 at $4. Watch for a better run this time.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr1) over 1720m at this track beaten 45 m by Hittheroadjack (2:02.80) in NR 60 to 69 on March 21 at $61. At the run before 7th (Fr1) over 1680m at Terang was 3rd-4.6 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Jilliby Willow (2:00.70) in NR 65 or better on March 2 at $61. Can do a lot better.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten Bendigo over 1650m, 7 days ago and two back 8th (Sr1) over 2190m at Shepparton, beaten 20 m by Blackjack Whacko (2:41.00) in NR 55 to 64 on March 24 at $31. Hard to recommend him on recent form.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1650m at Bendigo was 5th-8.97 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Lougle (1:57.70) in 0W/15 0K stake on April 8 at $51. Before that, and went on to finish a respectable ninth over 1650m at Bendigo last time out. Looks the testing material.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced and locked wheels with Major Bye just prior to the finish.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Sr2) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 7 m by Hes No Romeo (1:56.70) in NR 60 to 75 on April 1 at $23. Before that broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Sr5) over 2190m at Shepparton was 6th-11.02 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Blackjack Whacko (2:41.00) in NR 55 to 64 on March 24 at $51. Happy enough to dismiss.
